scams.title: Unmarked taxi overcharge
scams.what: Unofficial taxi (white car not RTA cream/red) charges 200 AED for 50 AED ride; no receipt
scams.avoid: ONLY use RTA taxis (cream + red roof), or Careem/Uber app. Pink taxis (female driver) available via Careem.

scams.title: Gold/jewelry shop overcharge (Deira/Gold Souk)
scams.where: Gold Souk Deira, some Old Dubai shops
scams.what: Massive markups for foreign tourists; aggressive bargaining required. 'Free' chai while you decide.
scams.avoid: Know spot gold price before entering (goldprice.org). Quote: 'Spot + 10% making charge max.' Walk away from anyone aggressive.

scams.title: Souvenir 'fake antique' scam
scams.where: Gold Souk, Spice Souk, Madinat Jumeirah souk
scams.what: Mass-produced trinkets sold as 'antique Bedouin artifacts' for 500-2,000 AED
scams.avoid: Check Madinat Jumeirah souvenir prices first (transparent). Real antiques only at certified dealers.

scams.title: Online booking fraud (apartment/villa)
scams.what: Fake Airbnb/Booking.com listings, often via WhatsApp inquiry redirect; deposit lost
scams.avoid: Book ONLY through Booking.com, Airbnb's official app. Never wire-transfer. Pay with credit card for chargeback ability.

scams.title: Pickpocketing in malls
scams.where: Dubai Mall, Mall of the Emirates, Global Village
scams.what: Crowded areas, escalators, food courts. Phone snatching from café tables.
scams.avoid: Crossbody bag in front. Don't leave phone on café table. Especially careful at Global Village (highest-risk crowded venue).

scams.title: Charity / petition scam
scams.where: Marina Walk, Downtown Burj area, near tourist hotels
scams.what: 'Refugee'/charity worker asks for cash donation; sob story; no receipt
scams.avoid: All real UAE charity is regulated; never street-collected. Politely decline. Don't give cash.

scams.title: ATM skimming
scams.where: Standalone ATMs especially Deira, Naif, near souks
scams.what: Skimmer + camera for PIN. Account drained in hours.
scams.avoid: Use ATMs INSIDE major bank branches (Emirates NBD, ENBD, ADCB, Mashreq) only. Not those in shops/streets.

scams.title: Desert safari low-cost trap
scams.what: $30 'all-inclusive' safari = battered 4x4, no insurance, mediocre BBQ. Some accidents reported.
scams.avoid: Book reputable: Platinum Heritage, Arabian Adventures, OceanAir Travels. Expect 250-400 AED ($70-110).

scams.title: Speeding fine surprise (rentals)
scams.what: Speed cameras EVERYWHERE; fines 600-3,000 AED + black points; rental company charges admin fee
scams.avoid: Stay under speed limit (120 km/h max highway). Check rental car return for fines settled before leaving.

scams.title: Photo of locals
scams.what: NOT a scam but a legal issue — photographing Emirati women without consent = criminal offense; some pretend offense for cash
scams.avoid: NEVER photograph people without explicit permission. No selfies with strangers in background. Especially women.
